basic_details.job_title: DHS South Garo Hills Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Health Society South Garo Hills
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society South Garo Hills (DHS South Garo Hills) Specialist - Obstetrics & Gynaecology Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DHS South Garo Hills. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DHS South Garo Hills Specialist - Obstetrics & Gynaecology Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with postgraduate degree/diploma in Obstetrics & Gynaecology i.e., MD/MS (Obs & Gynae), or DNB (Obs & Gynae), or DGO from a recognized university/institution. Registration with the State Medical Council or the Medical Council of India (now NMC) is mandatory.
qualification.details: MBBS with postgraduate degree/diploma in Obstetrics & Gynaecology i.e., MD/MS (Obs & Gynae), or DNB (Obs & Gynae), or DGO from a recognized university/institution. Registration with the State Medical Council or the Medical Council of India (now NMC) is mandatory.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: southgarohills.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: southgarohills.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS South Garo Hills Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS South Garo Hills Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a postgraduate degree or diploma in Obstetrics & Gynaecology (MD/MS, DNB, or DGO) from a recognized institution and must be registered with the State Medical Council or NMC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology position is 49 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post under the District Health Society South Garo Hills.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this role will involve an Interview and a Written Test. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society South Garo Hills, which is southgarohills.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary structure for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Specialist – Obstetrics & Gynaecology post is flexible and will be determined based on the candidate's years of experience.
